Sample HTML article for the local corpus indexer

This article has just enough body text to exceed the small-fixture threshold the indexer uses to decide whether to fall back from BeautifulSoup to the heavier unstructured.partition.html path. The default fixture sticks to the bs4 path; the unstructured fallback is exercised by a separate, mocked unit test.

Each paragraph contributes roughly the same number of whitespace tokens so the chunker has multiple candidate chunks to work with when the chunk-size cap is lowered for a test.

A third paragraph rounds out the document so that the cleaned text comfortably clears the minimum-length heuristic the extractor uses before deciding the bs4 output is good enough to keep.
